name: Elpis
description: The Promethean relies on Hope, tapping into a guiding force that provides clues through dreams and visions to aid his Pilgrimage.

name: Lair
description: A sanctuary the Promethean can retreat to for hiding or defense, providing protection from unwanted visitors.

name: Repute
description: The character has earned a reputation among Prometheans on the road, with stories of their deeds told and recalled by others of their kind.

name: Residual Memory
description: The Azoth did not wash away all remnants of the body's former inhabitant; the character retains some memories from before the spark of life.

name: Unpalatable Aura
description: Pandorans instinctively recoil from this Promethean's Azothic radiance, weakening their willingness to attack and reducing their Initiative in encounters.
